fork_status: Operator-owned fork of upstream nexu-io/open-design, disconnected and treated as our own (not a pull/fetch dependency on nexu-io).
purpose: end-user-use build staged in a TRACKED dist/ so build output never orphans from the codebase (INC-16 / CC12 / CC13).
nomenclature: <slug>-v<version>-<platform>.<ext> — slug FIRST; the disambiguating build-date + sha256 live in this manifest (CC4), not the filename.

source.upstream_lineage: nexu-io/open-design (disconnected; fork treated as our own)
source.glibc_note: native build — runs on modern glibc; rebuild with --containerized for Ubuntu 20.04-class distros

artifacts.process: pnpm tools-pack linux build --to appimage --portable — rebuilt this session; the 2026-07-13 AppImage had been cleaned from .tmp/ (INC-16 recurrence).

pnpm tools-pack linux build --to deb --portable — built 2026-07-13; reused verbatim because the working tree is byte-identical to commit 8480340b3 that produced it. dpkg-deb -I confirms a valid Debian v2.0 package with the full Electron Depends set.
